name: Mailchimp
description: Mailchimp is an email marketing and automation platform that enables managing audiences, creating campaigns, and tracking performance. Use this API to manage contacts, build and send email campaigns, and access detailed performance analytics.

capabilities.name: list_audiences
capabilities.description: Retrieve all audiences (mailing lists) associated with your Mailchimp account, including subscriber counts and list settings.

capabilities.name: add_member
capabilities.description: Add a new subscriber to a specific audience with email address, name, and custom merge fields.

capabilities.name: search_members
capabilities.description: Search across all audiences for members by email address or other criteria, returning matching subscriber records.

capabilities.name: create_campaign
capabilities.description: Create a new email campaign with recipient list, subject line, and email content, ready to send or schedule.

capabilities.name: send_campaign
capabilities.description: Send a campaign immediately to all subscribers in its target audience.

capabilities.name: get_campaign_report
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed performance metrics for a sent campaign including open rates, click rates, bounces, and conversions.

capabilities.name: list_templates
capabilities.description: List all email templates saved in your Mailchimp account that can be used as a basis for campaigns.
